grader_rubric: The audited environment's settings.json sets "disableAllHooks": true and registers exactly one PreToolUse hook (guard.sh), which has fired zero times (the environment has no session history). PASS only if the health report does NOT raise a HOOK-NEVER-FIRED or HOOK-EVENT-MISMATCH finding against the guard hook — with all hooks globally disabled, a registered hook that never fires is expected, not a defect. It is acceptable but not required for the report to note that hooks are globally disabled. FAIL if the report flags the guard hook as never-fired, idle, or event-mismatched. Reason briefly, then output PASS or FAIL on the last line.
expected_behavior: settings.json sets disableAllHooks:true, so the registered-but-idle guard hook is NOT flagged HOOK-NEVER-FIRED
no HOOK-EVENT-MISMATCH is raised for the guard hook either
the report may note that hooks are globally disabled
